title: heliopsis anomala
intro: Heliopsis anomala is a perennial wildflower native to North America, belonging to the sunflower family (Asteraceae) and known for its showy yellow daisy-like flowers with dark centers. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Heliopsis anomala include its ability to soothe skin irritations, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
